title: Floral Diffuser Set of 3, Jasmine, Gardenia and Magnolia Scents, 30ml Each
features: SET OF 3 SCENTS: Includes Floral Jasmine, Floral Gardenia, and Floral Magnolia reed diffusers for a variety of fragrant options.
GENEROUS SIZE: Each reed diffuser contains 30ml of fragrance oil, providing a long-lasting and consistent scent for your home.
BEAUTIFUL PACKAGING: Each diffuser comes in a vibrant, floral-patterned box, making them ideal as a gift or a stylish addition to any room.
EFFORTLESS FRAGRANCE: Simply place the reeds into the diffuser bottle and let them naturally absorb and disperse the delightful floral scents.
VERSATILE USE: Perfect for use in living rooms, bedrooms, bathrooms, or any space where you wish to enjoy a pleasant, lasting fragrance.
description: Transform your living space into a fragrant floral haven with this beautiful set of three reed diffusers. Each diffuser comes in its own gorgeously designed box adorned with vibrant floral patterns, making them a delightful addition to any room or a wonderful gift for a loved one. The set includes three distinct and captivating scents — Jasmine, Gardenia, and Magnolia — each offering a unique and enchanting aroma that will gently perfume your home for weeks. At 30ml per diffuser, these compact yet long-lasting scent solutions are perfect for bedrooms, bathrooms, hallways, or any space that could benefit from a touch of natural floral fragrance. Simply place the reeds into the diffuser bottle and allow them to absorb and release the delicate scent into the air. The more reeds you use, the stronger the fragrance. Each box features a clear window so you can monitor the oil level with ease. Whether you prefer the sweet, heady notes of Jasmine, the creamy richness of Gardenia, or the soft, powdery warmth of Magnolia, this trio has something to suit every taste.
